subject: Blue-skinned alien humanoid in red and dark armor, large elongated head
description: A tall, lean alien humanoid with distinctly blue skin and an elongated, large cranium stands in a three-quarter pose. The figure wears layered red and dark body armor with structural plating. The head is large and elongated compared to a human silhouette — a visible non-human diagnostic feature. The background glows with a vivid pink-purple energy burst radiating outward. The overall composition is a confident, imposing portrait of an alien warrior.
foreground: Blue-skinned alien with large elongated head in red/dark armor
emotion: Calm, cold confidence; imposing and assured
